name: Apply 1/3 rule
Preview 1/3 rule
script:
try:
    salary_slip_name = frappe.form_dict.get("salary_slip_name")
    if not salary_slip_name:
        frappe.throw("Salary Slip Name is required")

    doc = frappe.get_doc("Salary Slip", salary_slip_name)
    frappe.log_error(title="Salary Slip Script Triggered", message="Processing Salary Slip: " + doc.name)

    # Deduction priority list
    deduction_priority = [
        "COTU", "KPAWU", "Canteen Deduction", "Sacco Loan",
        "Sacco Emergency Loan", "Sacco Deposits", "Meko Gas",
        "Benevolent Deduction", "Laptops", "Okolea Cash", "Farm Produce",
        "Solar Panel Deduction", "Payroll Recoveries"
    ]

    # Statutory deductions
    statutory_deductions = [
        "NSSF Tier 1",
        "NSSF Tier 2",
        "Housing Levy",
        "SHIF",
        "HELB Loan"
    ]

    priority_deductions = []  # currently empty

    # Validate gross pay
    try:
        gross_pay_val = float(doc.gross_pay or 0)
    except:
        gross_pay_val = 0.0

    max_deductions_val = gross_pay_val * 0.6666666667
    frappe.log_error(
        title="Initial Values",
        message="Gross Pay = " + str(gross_pay_val) + ", Max Deductions (2/3) = " + str(max_deductions_val)
    )

    # Initialize totals
    statutory_total = 0.0
    priority_total = 0.0
    voluntary_deductions = []
    deduction_lookup = {}

    # Log all deductions
    all_deductions_log = "Deductions in Salary Slip:\n"
    for ded in (doc.deductions or []):
        all_deductions_log = all_deductions_log + "  - " + ded.salary_component + ": " + str(ded.amount) + "\n"
        if not ded.do_not_include_in_total:
            deduction_lookup[ded.salary_component] = ded
    frappe.log_error(title="All Deductions", message=all_deductions_log)

    # Classification log
    classification_log = "Deduction Classification:\n"
    for comp_name in deduction_lookup.keys():
        if comp_name in statutory_deductions:
            classification_log = classification_log + "[Statutory] " + comp_name + " = " + str(deduction_lookup[comp_name].amount) + "\n"
        elif comp_name in deduction_priority:
            classification_log = classification_log + "[Voluntary Priority] " + comp_name + " = " + str(deduction_lookup[comp_name].amount) + "\n"
        else:
            classification_log = classification_log + "[Other/Voluntary] " + comp_name + " = " + str(deduction_lookup[comp_name].amount) + "\n"
    frappe.log_error(title="Deduction Classification", message=classification_log)

    # Calculate statutory total
    for component in statutory_deductions:
        if component in deduction_lookup:
            try:
                statutory_total = statutory_total + float(deduction_lookup[component].amount or 0)
            except:
                pass
    frappe.log_error(title="Statutory Total", message="Statutory Total = " + str(statutory_total))

    # Calculate priority total
    for component in priority_deductions:
        if component in deduction_lookup:
            try:
                priority_total = priority_total + float(deduction_lookup[component].amount or 0)
            except:
                pass
    frappe.log_error(title="Priority Total", message="Priority Total = " + str(priority_total))

    # Build voluntary deductions
    for component in deduction_priority:
        if component in deduction_lookup:
            voluntary_deductions.append(deduction_lookup[component])
    for ded in (doc.deductions or []):
        if (not ded.do_not_include_in_total and
            ded.salary_component not in statutory_deductions and
            ded.salary_component not in priority_deductions and
            ded.salary_component not in deduction_priority):
            voluntary_deductions.append(ded)
    frappe.log_error(title="Voluntary Deductions", message="Voluntary Count = " + str(len(voluntary_deductions)))

    # Budget
    available_budget = max_deductions_val - statutory_total - priority_total
    if available_budget < 0:
        available_budget = 0.0
    frappe.log_error(title="Available Budget", message="Available = " + str(available_budget))

    # Process voluntary deductions
    deferred_list = []
    remaining_budget = available_budget
    total_applied = statutory_total + priority_total

    for ded in voluntary_deductions:
        try:
            original_amt = float(ded.amount or 0)
        except:
            original_amt = 0.0

        if remaining_budget >= original_amt:
            remaining_budget = remaining_budget - original_amt
            total_applied = total_applied + original_amt

        elif remaining_budget > 0:
            deferred_amt = original_amt - remaining_budget
            deferred_list.append({
                'name': ded.salary_component,
                'original': original_amt,
                'applied': remaining_budget,
                'deferred': deferred_amt
            })
            ded.amount = remaining_budget
            total_applied = total_applied + remaining_budget
            remaining_budget = 0.0

        else:
            deferred_list.append({
                'name': ded.salary_component,
                'original': original_amt,
                'applied': 0.0,
                'deferred': original_amt
            })
            ded.amount = 0.0

    frappe.log_error(title="Post-Processing Totals",
        message="Remaining Budget = " + str(remaining_budget) + ", Total Applied = " + str(total_applied))

    # Deferred log
    if deferred_list:
        summary_text = ""
        total_deferred = 0.0
        for item in deferred_list:
            summary_text = summary_text + "Component: " + item['name'] + ", Original: " + str(item['original']) + ", Applied: " + str(item['applied']) + ", Deferred: " + str(item['deferred']) + "\n"
            total_deferred = total_deferred + item['deferred']

        log_msg = (
            "Employee: " + str(doc.employee_name or "Unknown") + " (" + str(doc.employee or "Unknown") + ")\n" +
            "Salary Slip: " + doc.name + "\n" +
            "Gross Pay: " + str(round(gross_pay_val, 2)) + "\n" +
            "Max Deductions: " + str(round(max_deductions_val, 2)) + "\n" +
            "Total Applied: " + str(round(total_applied, 2)) + "\n" +
            "Total Deferred: " + str(round(total_deferred, 2)) + "\n\n" +
            summary_text
        )
        frappe.log_error(title="Deferred Deductions - " + str(doc.employee_name or "Unknown"), message=log_msg)

    # Recalculate total deductions & net pay
    new_total_deduction = 0.0
    for ded in (doc.deductions or []):
        if not ded.do_not_include_in_total:
            try:
                new_total_deduction = new_total_deduction + float(ded.amount or 0)
            except:
                pass

    doc.total_deduction = round(new_total_deduction, 2)
    doc.net_pay = round(gross_pay_val - new_total_deduction, 2)
    if doc.net_pay < 0:
        doc.net_pay = 0.0
    doc.rounded_total = round(doc.net_pay, 0)

    # DO NOT touch doc.gross_pay
    doc.flags.ignore_validate = True
    doc.flags.ignore_mandatory = True
    doc.save()

    frappe.log_error(title="Final Results", message="Total Deduction = " + str(new_total_deduction) + ", Net Pay = " + str(doc.net_pay))
    frappe.response["message"] = {"status": "success", "net_pay": doc.net_pay}

except Exception as e:
    frappe.log_error(title="Salary Slip Server Script Error", message="Error in salary slip processing: " + str(e))
    frappe.response["message"] = {"status": "error", "message": str(e)}

name: Preview_one_third rule
Generating 1/3 Rule Report
script:
slip_data = frappe.form_dict.get('slip_data')

# If it's a JSON string, parse it
if isinstance(slip_data, str):
    slip_data = frappe.parse_json(slip_data)

# If still empty/None -> respond with error
if not slip_data:
    frappe.response["message"] = {
        "status": "error",
        "error": "No data provided"
    }
else:
    # Build CSV content
    csv_lines = []
    csv_lines.append("1/3 RULE COMPLIANCE REPORT")
    csv_lines.append("Generated on: " + frappe.utils.now_datetime().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S"))
    csv_lines.append("")

    violations = [s for s in slip_data if s.get("is_violation")]
    csv_lines.append("SUMMARY")
    csv_lines.append("Total Salary Slips Checked:," + str(len(slip_data)))
    csv_lines.append("Violations Found:," + str(len(violations)))
    compliance_rate = ((len(slip_data) - len(violations)) / len(slip_data) * 100) if slip_data else 0
    csv_lines.append("Compliance Rate:," + "{:.1f}%".format(compliance_rate))
    csv_lines.append("")

    for slip in slip_data:
        csv_lines.append("=" * 80)
        csv_lines.append("EMPLOYEE DETAILS")
        csv_lines.append("Employee ID:," + str(slip.get("employee", "")))
        csv_lines.append("Employee Name:," + str(slip.get("employee_name", "")))
        csv_lines.append("Department:," + str(slip.get("department", "")))
        csv_lines.append("Designation:," + str(slip.get("designation", "")))
        csv_lines.append("Salary Slip:," + str(slip.get("salary_slip", "")))
        csv_lines.append("Period:,{} to {}".format(slip.get('start_date', ''), slip.get('end_date', '')))
        csv_lines.append("")

        csv_lines.append("EARNINGS")
        csv_lines.append("Component,Amount")
        for earning in slip.get("earnings", []):
            csv_lines.append("{},{}".format(earning.get("component", ""), earning.get("amount", 0)))
        csv_lines.append("GROSS PAY," + str(slip.get("gross_pay", 0)))
        csv_lines.append("")

        csv_lines.append("DEDUCTIONS")
        csv_lines.append("Component,Amount")
        for deduction in slip.get("deductions", []):
            csv_lines.append("{},{}".format(deduction.get("component", ""), deduction.get("amount", 0)))
        csv_lines.append("TOTAL DEDUCTIONS," + str(slip.get("total_deduction", 0)))
        csv_lines.append("")

        csv_lines.append("1/3 RULE ANALYSIS")
        csv_lines.append("Net Pay:," + str(slip.get("net_pay", 0)))
        csv_lines.append("Required Net Pay (1/3 of Gross):," + str(slip.get("threshold", 0)))
        csv_lines.append("Shortfall:," + str(slip.get("shortfall", 0)))
        csv_lines.append("Status:," + ("VIOLATION" if slip.get("is_violation") else "COMPLIANT"))

        if slip.get("is_violation"):
            csv_lines.append("")
            csv_lines.append("RECOMMENDED ACTION")
            csv_lines.append("Reduce deductions by:," + str(slip.get("shortfall", 0)))

        csv_lines.append("")
        csv_lines.append("")

    csv_content = "\n".join(csv_lines)

    file_name = "One_Third_Rule_Report_{}.csv".format(frappe.utils.now_datetime().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S'))
    file_doc = frappe.get_doc({
        "doctype": "File",
        "file_name": file_name,
        "is_private": 1,
        "content": csv_content.encode('utf-8')
    })
    file_doc.save(ignore_permissions=True)

    frappe.response["message"] = {
        "status": "success",
        "file_url": file_doc.file_url,
        "file_name": file_name
    }

name: Employee creation
script:
# Allowed employment types for HR users
allowed_types = ["Seasonal", "Permanent", "Annual Contract"]

# Get logged-in user
user = frappe.session.user

# Get all roles assigned to this user safely
user_roles = [r.role for r in frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"parent": user}, fields=["role"])]

# Apply restriction only for users with "Employee Creation - Non-Management"
if user != "Administrator" and "Non-management_employee_creation" in user_roles:
    if doc.employment_type not in allowed_types:
        frappe.throw(
            f"You are not allowed to create an Employee with Employment Type '{doc.employment_type}'. "
            "You can only create Seasonal, Permanent, or Annual Contract employees."
        )

name: Employee_creation_nonmanagement
script:
# Allowed employment types for HR users
allowed_types = ["Seasonal", "Permanent", "Annual Contract"]

# Get logged-in user
user = frappe.session.user

# Get all roles assigned to this user safely
user_roles = [r.role for r in frappe.get_all("Has Role", filters={"parent": user}, fields=["role"])]

# Apply restriction only for users with "Employee Creation - Non-Management"
if user != "Administrator" and "Non-management_employee_creation" in user_roles:
    if doc.employment_type not in allowed_types:
        frappe.throw(
            f"You are not allowed to create an Employee with Employment Type '{doc.employment_type}'. "
            "You can only create Seasonal, Permanent, or Annual Contract employees."
        )

name: Recurring Components
script:
# Fetch Employee record
employee_doc = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.employee)

# Safely get recurring deductions (empty list if None)
recurring_deductions = employee_doc.get("custom_recurring_deductions") or []

period_start = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.start_date)
period_end = frappe.utils.getdate(doc.end_date)

# Track existing components in Salary Slip to avoid duplicates
existing_components = {d.salary_component for d in doc.deductions}

for row in recurring_deductions:
    # Skip inactive deductions
    if not row.get("is_active"):
        continue
    
    # Check if deduction is valid for this salary period
    start_ok = not row.get("start_date") or frappe.utils.getdate(row.start_date) <= period_end
    end_ok = not row.get("end_date") or frappe.utils.getdate(row.end_date) >= period_start
    
    if start_ok and end_ok:
        component = row.get("deduction_type")
        
        # Append if not already in Salary Slip
        if component and component not in existing_components:
            doc.append("deductions", {
                "salary_component": component,
                "amount": row.get("amount") or 0,
                "default_amount": row.get("amount") or 0
            })
            existing_components.add(component)

# Recalculate total deductions including appended rows
doc.total_deduction = sum([d.amount for d in doc.deductions])
doc.net_pay = (doc.gross_pay or 0) - (doc.total_deduction or 0)
doc.rounded_total = round(doc.net_pay or 0)

# Use Frappe's built-in function to get first day of month
first_day_month = frappe.utils.get_first_day(doc.start_date)

# Calculate month-to-date
month_slips = frappe.get_all(
    "Salary Slip",
    filters={
        "employee": doc.employee,
        "docstatus": 1,
        "start_date": [">=", first_day_month],
        "end_date": ["<=", doc.end_date],
        "name": ["!=", doc.name]  # Exclude current slip to avoid duplicate counting
    },
    fields=["net_pay"]
)

doc.month_to_date = sum([s.net_pay for s in month_slips]) + (doc.net_pay or 0)

# Get fiscal year start date
fiscal_year_start = frappe.db.get_value("Fiscal Year", {"name": doc.fiscal_year}, "year_start_date")

# Fallback to first day of the start month if missing
if not fiscal_year_start:
    fiscal_year_start = frappe.utils.get_first_day(doc.start_date)

# Calculate year-to-date
year_slips = frappe.get_all(
    "Salary Slip",
    filters={
        "employee": doc.employee,
        "docstatus": 1,
        "start_date": [">=", fiscal_year_start],
        "end_date": ["<=", doc.end_date],
        "name": ["!=", doc.name]  # Exclude current slip to avoid duplicate counting
    },
    fields=["net_pay"]
)

doc.year_to_date = sum([s.net_pay for s in year_slips]) + (doc.net_pay or 0)
